title: Even spaces and motivic resolutions
speaker: Michael Hopkins
abstract: Abstract: In 1973 Steve Wilson proved the remarkable theorem that the even spaces in the loop spectrum for complex cobordism have cell decompositions with only even dimensional cells. The (conjectural) analogue of this in motivic homotopy theory leads to a surprising resolution of cellular varieties into motivic complexes. In this talk I will survey this situation and describe joint with with Mike Hill and with Jean Fasel and Aravind Asok progress and on potential applications.

proof_stages.label: Homotopy-theoretic reframing of algebraicity
proof_stages.summary: The talk motivates Voevodsky's legacy as importing homotopy-theoretic methods into algebraic geometry and poses the central question of when a topological complex vector bundle on a complex algebraic variety admits an algebraic structure.

proof_stages.label: Jouanolou affine replacement and projective-space tests
proof_stages.summary: Concrete bundles on projective spaces show that naive algebraic bundle theory is not homotopy invariant, motivating Jouanolou devices as affine homotopy approximations where algebraic and topological expectations can be compared.

proof_stages.label: Affine homotopy invariance and comparison categories
proof_stages.summary: The Serre--Quillen--Suslin--Bass--Quillen--Lindel history and the topological, algebraic, and motivic homotopy categories are assembled so that vector bundles become maps to BGL and algebraicity becomes a two-step lifting problem.

proof_stages.label: Motivic obstruction theory for vector bundles
proof_stages.summary: Motivic homotopy theory supplies obstruction theory whose coefficients are motivic homotopy sheaves of BGL, producing finer obstructions and invariants than ordinary Chern classes or the formal algebraic-homotopy classification.

proof_stages.label: Rees bundles as the test case
proof_stages.summary: The speaker recalls Elmer Rees's rank-two topological bundles on complex projective spaces with vanishing Chern classes and states the theorem that these bundles nevertheless have algebraic incarnations over the Jouanolou affine devices.

proof_stages.label: Motivic construction of the Rees lifts
proof_stages.summary: The proof imitates the Bott factorial splitting via Suslin's algebraic lift of unimodular rows and then uses a torsion operation in motivic homotopy to correct the Hodge weight and obtain the required motivic lift into BGL_2.

proof_stages.label: Wilson-space and Adams--Novikov strategy for all bundles
proof_stages.summary: To go beyond the Rees bundles, the speaker proposes an unstable Adams--Novikov/complex-cobordism resolution governed by a motivic Wilson-space hypothesis, which together with HZ-completeness would imply a bijection between algebraic bundles on the device and topological bundles on projective space.

proof_stages.label: Evidence for motivic Wilson purity
proof_stages.summary: Geometric torus-action heuristics and recent real-equivariant results with Mike Hill are offered as evidence that Wilson's theorem should have a broad geometric motivic explanation rather than being merely a calculation.
